robotics.title: ABB Robotics includes vSLAM navigation in F712 autonomous forklift
robotics.summary: The Flexley Stacy F712 forklift uses vision to navigate, works with other robots, and complies with safety standards, says ABB Robotics.

robotics.title: Tesollo initiates IPO process while developing humanoid hands
robotics.summary: Tesollo, a South Korean robotic hand specialist, has officially begun preparations for its initial public offering.

robotics.title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
robotics.summary: Forterra has deployed more than 100 of its self-driving ATVs in conflict zones in Ukraine.

robotics.title: HIVE brings in $15M to build physical AI for industrial machines
robotics.summary: HIVE has deployed its technology across several sites in Scandinavia, operating autonomously across different machines.
